data.description: Choose tech stack based on Asimov research (likely Next.js or Astro). Set up project scaffolding, design system foundations (typography scale, spacing, color tokens). Configure deployment (Vercel or Netlify). Deliverable: working project skeleton deployed to staging.
data.title: Tech stack selection & project setup

data.body: Framework decision changed from Astro to Next.js 15 (App Router). Rationale: matching the Asimov Collective stack directly — 11/12 of their sites use Next.js. Same stack = same patterns = less reverse-engineering. Gains: next/font, next/image, RSC for zero-JS content pages, native R3F path for future interactive layers.

Implementation complete: Next.js 15 scaffolded with App Router, Tailwind design tokens (full color/typography/spacing system from plan Section 3), content utilities (gray-matter + next-mdx-remote for 4 content types), all 11 pages routed and rendering, placeholder MDX content in all collections, GrainOverlay component, hide-on-scroll Header, Footer, placeholder Google Fonts via next/font, CLAUDE.md updated with essential commands and code conventions. pnpm build succeeds — 13 static pages generated.

Review (agent:claude-opus-4-reviewer): PASS with inline fixes.

## Build & Lint
- pnpm build: PASSES (13 pages, 102kB First Load JS shared)
- pnpm lint: PASSES (zero warnings/errors)

## Acceptance Criteria
11 of 14 criteria met by the implementation agent. 2 fixed inline. 1 deferred.

### Met by implementation agent (11/14):
1. Directory structure matches plan
2. pnpm dev/build work without errors
3. All 7 page routes present + 3 dynamic [slug] routes with generateStaticParams
4. Design tokens precisely match plan (CSS custom properties + Tailwind config)
5. Content loading utilities typed for all 4 collections
6. One placeholder MDX per collection with valid frontmatter
7. Typography scale, weights, spacing all correct
8. Grain overlay implemented (SVG feTurbulence, fixed positioning, aria-hidden)
9. CLAUDE.md comprehensively updated (commands, conventions, debugging heuristics, tree)
10. next/font configured with placeholder fonts + CSS variables
11. next/image configured (AVIF + WebP)

### Fixed inline by reviewer (2/14):
12. **@tailwindcss/typography missing**: `prose` class used in 4 content pages (architecture/[slug], software/[slug], writing/[slug], now) but plugin was not installed. Installed `@tailwindcss/typography` and added to Tailwind config plugins. Build still passes.
13. **Lenis smooth scroll stub missing**: Created `src/components/global/SmoothScroll.tsx` as a pass-through stub with clear integration instructions in comments. CSS scroll-behavior: smooth provides baseline.

### Deferred (1/14):
14. **Vercel deployment**: Not done, explicitly deferred to ASMV-9 per CLAUDE.md. Acceptable.

## Code Quality Notes
- Clean RSC/client boundary: only Header.tsx uses 'use client'
- Proper Next.js 15 async params pattern (params: Promise<{slug: string}>)
- Consistent layout patterns across all pages
- Good error handling with notFound() on all dynamic routes
- Proper metadata system with title template
- Accessibility: GrainOverlay has aria-hidden=true

## Minor observations (non-blocking, for future reference):
- Header scroll handler re-registers on every scroll (useRef would be more efficient)
- scripts/ directory from plan not created (generate-textures.mjs, optimize-images.mjs) -- not needed until real content
- next-sitemap not installed (SEO optimization, future concern)

Verdict: PASS. Inline fixes applied and verified.
